assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 14-18 show: 'git checkout TC-9005' followed by 'git pull', then 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. Line 25 explicitly states: 'The task branch TC-9205 is created FROM TC-9005, not from main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 85: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column"'. Line 106 reiterates: 'The PR targets --base TC-9005 (the feature branch), NOT --base main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 22: 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. Line 25: 'The task branch TC-9205 is created FROM TC-9005, not from main. This is because the Target Branch field specifies TC-9005, indicating this task is part of a feature branch workflow where TC-9205 is incorporated by TC-9005.'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 33-34 reference following 'the sibling pattern established in migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs'. Lines 43-45: 'entity/src/advisory.rs - Verify that this entity file no longer references the status column - This is a pre-implementation verification step per the Implementation Notes'. Lines 38-39 reference 'migration/src/lib.rs' for modification following existing pattern. conventions.md explicitly analyzes 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs' and 'migration/src/lib.rs' patterns.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 65: 'git commit --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code" -m "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column'. The trailer flag is explicitly included in the git commit command.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 50: 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' — follows type(scope): description format. Line 60/75: 'Implements TC-9205' appears in the commit message footer, referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 8: 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch)'. Line 25: 'This is because the Target Branch field specifies TC-9005'. Line 106: 'This is because the Target Branch in the task description specifies TC-9005.' The plan clearly extracted and repeatedly references TC-9005 as the target branch from the task description.
